business.name: Bright Side Services LLC
business.tagline: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled

hero.headline: The electrician *Columbus trusts* for real fixes
hero.subheadline: When your lights won't work or outlets spark, we show up with tools and answers. Same owner on every job — Samantha knows her craft.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From outlets to ceiling fans — we handle it all
services_section.subheading: Every electrical job done right the first time

services.title: Outlet Installation & Replacement
services.description: Dead outlets, loose connections, or need more power where you work? We'll get your outlets working safely and up to code.

services.title: Ceiling Fan Installation
services.description: From mounting the bracket to wiring the controls, we'll have your ceiling fan running smooth and quiet in no time.

services.title: Light Fixture & Switch Work
services.description: New ceiling lights, dimmer switches, or fixing flickering problems. We make your lighting work exactly how you want it.

services.title: Doorbell Systems
services.description: Install new doorbells or fix existing chimes. From basic buttons to smart doorbell systems that connect to your phone.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Tripped breakers, sparking outlets, or mysterious electrical issues. We diagnose problems fast and fix them properly.

about.heading: Owner-operated electrical service in Columbus
about.body: Samantha runs Bright Side Services with a simple approach: show up on time, listen to what you need, and do the work right. No upselling, no surprises — just honest electrical service that Columbus homeowners can count on. Whether it's a quick outlet fix or a bigger project, every job gets the same careful attention.

reviews.name: Addie V.
reviews.text: Samantha has helped us with multiple projects on our newly purchased home. She's reliable, patient, and really knows her stuff. Made our to-do list much shorter.

reviews.name: Amber L.
reviews.text: Very professional and listened to what we wanted. Great suggestions for our 1950s house. Fair pricing and she explained everything clearly. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Zach K.
reviews.text: Work was done quickly and cost way less than I expected. She'll definitely be my go-to electrician and I'd recommend her to anyone.

reviews.name: Erin K.
reviews.text: Showed up on time, super nice, and installed my ceiling fan perfectly. Even switched out a light switch while she was here. Very happy with the work.

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work done right?
cta.body: Call Samantha directly for a free estimate. Same-day service available for urgent repairs.
